creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
I saw those messages in the tray icon:

file:///usr/local/share/plasma/plasmoids/martchus.syncthingplasmoid/contents/ui/main.qml:13:34: Type FullRepresentation unavailable

file:///usr/local/share/plasma/plasmoids/martchus.syncthingplasmoid/contents/ui/FullRepresentation.qml:16:9: Type ToolBar unavailable

file:///usr/local/share/plasma/plasmoids/martchus.syncthingplasmoid/contents/ui/ToolBar.qml:7:1: module "martchus.syncthingplasmoid" is not installed

Still need to check what is the root cause of them.
